lines.hearsay: The day's paper got read out at {place}, and the room listened.
lines.gossip: {A} keeps a pint in front of {B} all evening at {place} so {B} will read the board out to the room, and {A} has never once called it what it is, which is the cheapest entertainment in the village.
lines.report: {B} read the day's filings to the room at {place}, {A} presiding, slot {slot}.
